title: README operator quickstart researcher product proof cross-link v0
problem: Tickets 381–384 delivered prove-researcher-product and operator plan/verify/autocycle integration, but README Operator Quickstart does not document the proof command, gitignored artifact path, or researcher_product_proof_status plan fields.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents prove-researcher-product command and gitignored artifact path.
README notes researcher_product_proof_status / product_verdict without duplicating full operator_loop JSON.
